messages.content: Where do I register for a first responder discount

To register for any discounts or promotions, please visit our product registration page: 🔗 [Product Registration](https://rambobikes.com/pages/product-registration). If you have specific questions about the first responder discount, feel free to reach out to our customer service team directly.
How can I assist you today? Please provide more details about what you need help with.
